title: Qingyin Cai
text:
Hello! Welcome to my website. My name is Qingyin Cai.
I am a PhD student in the Department of Applied Economics at the University of Minnesota. My research interests are in agricultrual economics and environmental economics.
Specific Topics I am interested in include:

Climate Change
Sustainable Agriculture

I obtained my Bachelor’s and Master’s degree in Economics from the Zhejiang University.
Here is my CV.
You can contact me at cai00154@umn.edu.
